title: Mrs. Mike
writer: DeWitt Bodeen, Benedict Freedman, Nancy Freedman
actors: Dick Powell, Evelyn Keyes, J.M. Kerrigan
plot: While visiting her uncle in Alberta, Boston-born Kathy O'Fallon meets Canadian Mountie Mike Flannigan. They fall in love, marry, and go north to Mike's new posting. Together, they face and deal with many hardships, including crude...
